item.title: Thoughts on this?
item.description:
https://www.reddit.com/r/facepalm/comments/18gt49c/helluva_good_idea/
The response on reddit reads: People have to realize by now that "GOTCHA!" doesnt work on republicans. The leadership most likely anticipated and hoped for something like this, because this will allow them to soapbox and raise donations about how unfaithful and satanic and godless people are becoming and they need every jesus-warrior to show up and give donations and vote and help keep the country pure and white and everything right. There is no way to convince republican with logic and reason, because their arguments and conclusions aren't based in logic and reason. its emotion and greed. The left keeps continuing the same ol tactic from the 90s. Clever remarks and appeal to logic and reason by pointing out hypocrisy. They watch late night shows like daily show and talk hosts make fun of the republican politicians, laugh and point fingers and call the right dumb dumbs. But the right is the group that continuously shows up and votes, they are the ones that despite being at best 25-28% of the country, have amassed 50% control of congress. They enacted abortion bans and are actively pushing policies stripping people of their rights. Yet Left continues to point and laugh "hahahahaha see they so stupid!". But when voting time comes, they sit back down and watch more infortainment if any or just straight intant gratification things like gaming or porn. In 2022, only 20% of elligible voters under the age of 35 voted. Only 100m Voted while 150m elligible voters did not vote. Thats 3x as many voters as either party got. Republican politicians dont give a shit that you laugh at them, they are working hard to gain more control so you will become a slave for them. They want you to think of them as dumb and silly. They raise money off of such ridicule.
item.dc:creator: DCA4242

item.title: Shiver me Tinders
item.description: There I was. A 21 years old, single male who picked up and left my hometown to pursue adventures elsewhere. I only ended up about 4 hours from where I grew up, but figured this would be a nice place to start fresh. I was excited to check out the town and see what the night life was like. Once I found work, a roommate, and got settled in an apartment, I was interested in looking into the dating scene again. My roommate worked odd hours, and I usually would have to go to the bar alone since I didn't know anyone else in town and admittedly have a hard time making friends. I decided to try Tinder for the first time instead. I was skeptical. After downloading the application and swiping on potential matches, now I just had to wait. The following morning, I was greeted by a flurry of new matches. One of which had already sent me messages. I was ecstatic! She looked kind and was a good-looking girl based on her profile description. I figured I'd play it cool and just be myself. She seemed to take a liking to me quickly, and we decided to meet up. She disclosed that she was from the area and had grown up there. We agreed that beer and burgers would be a fun idea, as we had both turned 21 somewhat recently, and so she recommended the best local spot. She requested that I pick her up at her address, which I was glad to do. It was on the outskirts of town. Upon arriving, I noticed a decrepit looking home. The shingles were falling off, windows were cracked or broken, and overgrowth and dirt covered the majority of the exterior. I waited in my car for about 15 minutes before she came out. I was pleasantly surprised! She looked exactly as she did in her photos. I was afraid I would be catfished. I opened the door to let her in the vehicle. We started light conversation and made our way to the bar and grill for lunch. She was on her phone for most of the drive. When we arrived at the bar and grill (about 15 minutes from her house) she realized that she forgot her ID and her purse. Now I didn't mind necessarily that she didn't have her purse, as I was willing to pay, but she was insistent that they card people at this establishment, and so she'd need it. I proceeded to drive us back to her home. She was much more talkative than earlier. Upon arriving back at her house, she invited me to come inside. I declined and told her I'd wait in the car. She waited in the car with me and continued to ask me to accompany her. Against my best judgment, I finally caved so we could just go eat. I was fucking starving at this point and a cold beer and a burger was sounding fantastic. She led me to the entrance of the house. When we entered, there were two large men in dark, dirty, and torn clothes sifting through large black garbage bags in her living room. There were no lights on, just some shimmers of light through shades or cardboard openings on the few windows. They didn't so much as even glance at either of us. I noticed some white looking residue, broken glass, and other miscellaneous items on a table in front of them. We proceeded to just walk past them, up a long staircase, and directly into another dark room that she said was hers, where there was a bed with a man sleeping in it. She grabbed her purse from the nightstand, next to the sleeping guy and I'm thinking (what in the actual fuck is going on)!? My heart is pounding at this point because I'm sketched out about the sleeping guy possibly being her boyfriend or something, as well as the hefty possibility of getting stabbed on my way out by inky and blinky downstairs on the couch. I just wanted to get out of there as quickly as possible, as this living situation had odd dynamics, to say the least, and I had a question or two for my date. We were about to go down the staircase when I could see her phone illuminating behind me, as it was the brightest thing in the house. Just then, she abruptly stepped in front of the staircase, blocking my path. She looks at her phone, then at me. She says, "How about you hang out here a few more minutes? There's someone coming over shortly to buy some glass, and we're going to rip him off." Yeah, no. I ran out of that house so fucking fast and peeled away in my four cylinder Ford focus, leaving dust in my trail. I am so relieved they didn't lock the door after I entered or rob me, as that was likely the plan. It was very brazen to have invited me into their drug lair like that. Quite an experience as my first Tinder date. I did go back to that bar and grille that my date recommended and had a cold one and a burger before proceeding home. Never had a beer and burger ever tasted so good. Dates can be hard to judge, and the cover doesn't tell the whole story. Just hope she's not a meth dealer with a boyfriend living that thug life. Stay safe out there! -Kudos and Thanks for reading!
item.dc:creator: betatestyourgirlfriend

item.title: Images of Note: Superman's Fursona
item.description:
Any economic theory that sees people are rational robots is not one based on
creechur
:)
me to myself >:(
owo
O _ O
mother i am experience the sensations.
Yes this is what that is like.
Truly unstoppable.
Stardew Valley basically.
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
Oh look, it's capitalism trying to strip us of the one thing they do not control.
shork
This is basically My Horse Prince.
Can't argue with that logic. This also make Batman a reverse furry.
Hell yeah
The Hero returns. o7
War Thunder people make train sim people look like amateurs.
Fuck the Government.
There is (or was) and illegal cinema in the catacombs of Paris.
Kinda wish they'd just say to people "we'll burn it after Christmas" or something.
Indiana is the furry police state, I don't make the rules John Green.
owo
me tbh
dey home
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: I’d agree with him because he doesn’t ever have to grade papers or homework after hours. School bell rings and he’s done with work!
item.dc:creator: tanijrou

item.title: Birthday Trans Progress sorry for selfie.
item.description:
This is me at 31. It is my birthday today and I'm trying to remember the last 10 years, it's all been so crazy.
And this is me at 41, I got long hair, tattoos, I get to wear make-up, I am happy. (There's a lot going on rn).
Cat tax! Kitsune, she's asleep in my hood. Thank you all for the well wishes and everything I totally didn't expect this at all! Ps did anyone notice I was wearing the same shirt ;)
item.dc:creator: Crimsnfox
